title: SEO Health Report
tagline: Comparison of raw HTML (indexed by Google) vs JavaScript render
crawl_line: Last crawl: {lastCrawl} · {pages} pages crawled · Generated on {generated}

md.table_header: | Critical regressions | Warnings | Recommendations | Pages crawled |
md.signature_mismatch_one: **⚠️ {count} page where Google and AIs see different content than your visitors** (gap between the raw HTML and the JavaScript render).
md.signature_mismatch_other: **⚠️ {count} pages where Google and AIs see different content than your visitors** (gap between the raw HTML and the JavaScript render).
md.signature_ok: **✅ No gap detected between what your visitors see and what Google and AIs see.**
md.purged_one: **ℹ️ {count} page removed from monitoring** — removal (410, out of the sitemap) digested by Google after the monitoring window. If a URL comes back to your sitemap, it will be monitored again automatically.
md.purged_other: **ℹ️ {count} pages removed from monitoring** — removal (410, out of the sitemap) digested by Google after the monitoring window. If a URL comes back to your sitemap, it will be monitored again automatically.
md.regressions_title: 1. Regressions — what used to work and degraded
md.regressions_intro: *Fix these first: each entry is a change detected between two crawls (or an abnormal state), not an optimization tip.*
md.regressions_empty: ✅ No open regressions on this zone. Monitoring continues on every crawl.
md.repaired_empty: No fixed regressions detected during the last crawl.
md.recommendations_title: 3. Audit recommendations — what was never optimal
md.recommendations_intro: *Best practices detected on every crawl. Never blocking, never urgent — not to be confused with the regressions in section 1.*
md.more_alerts: ... and {count} more alerts on this page
md.annex_more_pages: {count} more pages have open alerts — see the dashboard for the full list.
md.footer: *Report generated by [Seogard](https://seogard.io) — continuous SEO/GEO monitoring. Raw HTML vs JavaScript render comparison on every page.*

pdf.meaning_critical: {count} critical regression(s): pages are at risk of dropping out of the Google index or losing their position. Fix these first.
pdf.meaning_warning: {count} warning regression(s): signals have degraded — check them before they start to weigh.
pdf.meaning_signature: {count} page(s) with different content for machines: Google does not see them fully on the first pass, and AIs (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude) barely see them at all.
pdf.meaning_ok: No open regressions: what your visitors, Google and AIs see is consistent. Monitoring continues on every crawl.
pdf.signature_mismatch_one: {count} page where Google and AIs see different content than your visitors (raw HTML vs JavaScript render gap).
pdf.signature_mismatch_other: {count} pages where Google and AIs see different content than your visitors (raw HTML vs JavaScript render gap).
pdf.signature_ok: No gap detected between what your visitors see and what Google and AIs see.
pdf.regressions_title: Regressions — what used to work and degraded
pdf.regressions_empty: No open regressions on this zone. Monitoring continues on every crawl.
pdf.repaired_empty: No fixed regressions detected during the last crawl.
pdf.detail_body: this PDF is a summary. For ALL pages and alerts (URLs included), download the Markdown export of the report from the Seogard dashboard ("Export for AI" button).
